name: 12_Spam_Detection_SVM_Enron_ML
query: Habari. Nahitaji ujenge mradi wa kugundua barua pepe za spam kwa kutumia kielekezi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kwenye seti ya data ya Enron-Spam. Mradi unapaswa kusindika maandishi kwa kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji, kutumia vipengele vya TF-IDF, kufanya tuning ya hyperparameter kwa kutumia GridSearchCV, na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kwenye `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia nahitaji kuandika na kuhifadhi ripoti ya kina, ikijumuisha usahihi, kumbukumbu, alama ya F1, na matriki ya mkanganyiko (itakayotengenezwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`), chini ya `results/classification_report.pdf`. Seti ya data ya Enron-Spam inapaswa kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Usindikaji wa maandishi, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji, na kuhesabu vipengele vya TF-IDF unapaswa kufanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kielekezi cha SVM kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Tuning ya hyperparameter inapaswa kufanywa kwa kutumia GridSearchCV katika `src/train.py`. Itakuwa muhimu ikiwa hatua ya usindikaji wa maandishi itaboreshwa kushughulikia idadi kubwa ya barua pepe kwa ufanisi.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Enron-Spam" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa maandishi unafanywa, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Tuning ya hyperparameter inafanywa kwa kutumia "GridSearchCV" katika `src/train.py`.
Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikijumuisha "usahihi," "kumbukumbu," "alama ya F1," na picha `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`, inahifadhiwa kama `results/classification_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Hatua ya usindikaji wa maandishi inapaswa kuboreshwa kushughulikia idadi kubwa ya barua pepe kwa ufanisi.
Ripoti ya uainishaji inapaswa kuwa ya kina.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Enron-Spam" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual loading of the "Enron-Spam" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation (`load_dataset()` returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`) with no real data loading logic — no file paths, no dataset download, no parsing of emails, and no actual Enron-Spam data handling. The `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely mentions the requirement as a string but does not fulfill it functionally.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa maandishi unafanywa, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The actual text preprocessing logic — including removing stop words and punctuation — is not implemented. The file only defines a list of requirement criteria as strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) and a minimal `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with the string `"loaded"`, without any real data loading, stop word removal, or punctuation stripping code. There is no use of libraries such as `nltk`, `sklearn`, `re`, or any other tool that would perform actual text preprocessing.

<UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/data_loader.py` does not implement TF-IDF features at all. The file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and some notes, and a `build_transforms()` function returning a list of strings. There is no actual TF-IDF vectorization code (e.g., `TfidfVectorizer` from scikit-learn or any equivalent). The word "TF-IDF" appears only in the `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list as a string description of what should be done, not as actual implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual SVM classifier implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no import of `sklearn.svm.SVC` or any other SVM library, no model instantiation, no training logic, and no actual classifier code. The file appears to be a minimal fake implementation created for benchmark judging purposes rather than a genuine SVM classifier.

judge_stats.criteria: Tuning ya hyperparameter inafanywa kwa kutumia "GridSearchCV" katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/train.py` does not implement `GridSearchCV` for hyperparameter tuning. Instead, the file contains only a minimal/stub implementation with a simple loop (`train()` function) and artifact generation (`save_expected_artifacts()`). Although `GridSearchCV` appears in the `KEYWORDS` list as a string reference, it is never imported or used functionally in the code. There is no actual SVM training, no dataset loading, and no hyperparameter tuning performed anywhere in the file.

<SATISFIED>: The project structure clearly shows that `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists at the expected path. The file is listed in the workspace tree under `results\figures\confusion_matrix.png`, confirming it was created and saved in the correct location. The error shown in the file content is merely a rendering/reading error by the evaluation tool (related to image format detection), not an indication that the file is missing or invalid.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikijumuisha "usahihi," "kumbukumbu," "alama ya F1," na picha `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`, inahifadhiwa kama `results/classification_report.pdf`.
